framework.name: Scope Precision Prevents Privilege Escalation
framework.description: Vaguely defined OAuth scopes create security vulnerabilities through excessive permissions. Precise scope definitions (e.g., 'email.read' vs 'email') are necessary to prevent applications from gaining unintended access beyond user authorization.
framework.raw_quote: Indiscriminately defined scopes can lead to excessive access permissions, spurring security vulnerabilities. For instance, an application that only requested 'read' permission for emails but is wrongly given nearly limitless access, could unduly exploit the user's emails without their knowledge.
